overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person view at a neon-lit street food stall at night. The player observes customers eating at the counter before moving into the back kitchen area where food is being prepared.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food counter with neon lighting

events.description: blonde woman sits down at the counter to eat from a green bowl

agents.ego_description: standing at the food counter watching customers eat and the vendor work

notable_agents.action: eating noodles with chopsticks from a green takeout box
vendor with pink cap working behind the counter

entered.detail: long glass display counter with metal frame separating customers from food preparation
tall stacks of white ceramic bowls on the counter corner
illuminated digital display showing menu items in cyan text
traditional red paper lanterns hanging above the street in the background
bright neon advertisements and store signs visible down the wet street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk street food stall at night, illuminated by cyan and magenta neon lights. A vendor works behind a glass counter while a customer with spiky hair eats noodles on the right. A blonde woman arrives and sits down to eat, joining the sparse crowd in this sheltered commercial walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food counter with neon lighting

events.description: blonde woman stands up and walks away from the counter

agents.ego_description: watching the customer leave while remaining at the counter

notable_agents.action: blonde woman walking away from the counter toward the street

segments.scene_description: The blonde customer finishes eating, stands up, and walks away from the counter toward the neon-lit street. The camera remains focused on the counter area as the crowd thins, with only the spiky-haired customer and vendor remaining.

scene_state.functional_zone: back kitchen cooking area with steam and industrial equipment

events.description: camera moves from front counter into the back kitchen preparation area
steam from cooking pots becomes visible as camera approaches the stove

agents.ego_description: walking through the food stall into the kitchen preparation area to observe the cooking space

notable_agents.action: cook working at the industrial stove with steam rising from large pots

entered.detail: large metal cooking range with multiple burners and steam rising from pots
white steam and smoke rising from the cooking equipment creating atmospheric haze
stacked cardboard boxes with red markings stored under the preparation tables
large industrial ventilation hood above the cooking station

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the vendor and transitions into the narrow back kitchen, leaving the neon-lit street behind. Industrial cooking equipment dominates the space with steam rising from large pots. Cardboard storage boxes line the left side while the camera explores the food preparation area, revealing the working cook at the stove.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit street food stall into the industrial grit of its back kitchen. It begins under cyan and magenta lights where a vendor serves a sparse crowd, including a spiky-haired man and a blonde woman eating at a glass counter. As the blonde customer finishes her meal and departs toward the street, the crowd thins, leaving the camera focused on the remaining patrons. The view then shifts, gliding past the vendor to leave the neon glow behind and enter a narrow, dimly lit kitchen. Finally, the scene expands into the food preparation area, where steam rises from large pots and cardboard storage boxes line the walls beside a cook working at the stove.
